scripts.bt: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint:check && pnpm test
scripts.lint: biome check --write packages/delphi-protocol packages/delphi-knowledge packages/delphi-ingestion packages/delphi-extraction packages/delphi-indexer packages/delphi-agent apps/api apps/mcp scripts tests
scripts.lint:check: biome check packages/delphi-protocol packages/delphi-knowledge packages/delphi-ingestion packages/delphi-extraction packages/delphi-indexer packages/delphi-agent apps/api apps/mcp scripts tests
scripts.format: biome format --write packages/delphi-protocol packages/delphi-knowledge packages/delphi-ingestion packages/delphi-extraction packages/delphi-indexer packages/delphi-agent apps/api apps/mcp scripts tests
